[10-12] The scene cuts to a blue screen displaying white text "MEIN FREU" with a cursor, transitioning to "MEIN FREUND IST AfD" over a red arrow logo with the man's smiling head, before returning to the man before the flag. [12-14] The man stands centrally before the waving flag again, lifting both arms with palms facing up in an expressive gesture while speaking. [16-18] A bald man in a black leather jacket keeps his arm around an older man in a dark suit and tie. Both turn heads inward to look at each other before the black, red, and gold waving German flag; the older man opens his mouth slightly. [18-20] The bald man turns forward, raising his right hand to point a finger at the older man's chest while keeping his left arm around the shoulder. [20-24] He lowers his pointing hand, shifting to small gestures with curled fingers while speaking, moving his right hand

[14-16] An older man with grey hair, wearing a dark suit and light tie, enters from the right to stand beside a bald man in a black leather jacket and maroon graphic t-shirt. The bald man places his left arm around the suited man's shoulder against a waving German flag background. [26-38] The bald man maintains this embrace while gesturing with his right hand—raising it with an open palm [28-30] before lowering it to his waist with curled fingers [30-38]. He briefly turns his head to look at the older man [32-34] before facing forward again. The older man remains stationary facing forward throughout, while the '2DF' logo is visible in the top left corner.

[38-46] Standing before a large waving German flag, the bald man in a black leather jacket and red Iron Man shirt gestures with his right hand. Beside him, the older man in a dark suit and tie stands completely motionless. [46-52] The scene cuts to a domestic indoor setting where both men sit on a grey couch. The older man holds a CD case reading "ANDREA BERG" along with a large silver cylindrical object. The bald man sits beside him, turning his head slightly forward with his mouth open as if speaking. A green plant and blue pillow are visible in the background.

[52-56] At a table with a red and white checkered cloth, an older man in a suit feeds a bald man in a black leather jacket and red graphic t-shirt. The bald man chews with food hanging from his lip against a beige wall.
[56-60] The scene shifts to a stage with a waving German flag. The bald man stands with arms extended outward, palms up, then lowers them. Beside him, the older man in a dark suit stands motionless. A ZDF logo is in the top left.

[10-12] The scene cuts to a blue screen displaying white text "MEIN FREU" with a cursor, transitioning to "MEIN FREUND IST AfD" over a red arrow logo with the man's smiling head, before returning to the man before the flag. [12-14] The man stands centrally before the waving flag again, lifting both arms with palms facing up in an expressive gesture while speaking. [16-18] A bald man in a black leather jacket keeps his arm around an older man in a dark suit and tie. Both turn heads inward to look at each other before the black, red, and gold waving German flag; the older man opens his mouth slightly. [18-20] The bald man turns forward, raising his right hand to point a finger at the older man's chest while keeping his left arm around the shoulder. [20-24] He lowers his pointing hand, shifting to small gestures with curled fingers while speaking, moving his right hand

[52-56] At a table with a red and white checkered cloth, an older man in a suit feeds a bald man in a black leather jacket and red graphic t-shirt. The bald man chews with food hanging from his lip against a beige wall.
[56-60] The scene shifts to a stage with a waving German flag. The bald man stands with arms extended outward, palms up, then lowers them. Beside him, the older man in a dark suit stands motionless. A ZDF logo is in the top left.
[60-66] A blue lower-third graphic appears with "MEIN FREUND IST AfD" and text: "Artikel 4: „Die Freiheit des Glaubens, [...] und des religiösen [...] Bekenntnisses sind unverletzlich.“" The bald man gestures with his right hand, raising and lowering it, while the older man remains still.

From 66-70s, a bald man in a black leather jacket over a maroon graphic t-shirt stands beside an older man in a dark suit and tie against a German flag background. The bald man holds his right hand near his waist while a blue lower-third graphic displays "Artikel 4: „Die Freiheit des Glaubens, [...] und des religiösen [...] Bekenntnisses sind unverletzlich." At 70s, the graphic vanishes, leaving both men standing with arms at their sides. Between 72-74s, the older man lowers his hands. From 74-76s, the bald man raises both arms outward with palms up, then lowers them by 78s. Finally, at 78-80s, he raises both arms outward with palms up again while the older man remains motionless.

[82-84] A bald man in a black leather jacket and an older man in a dark suit stand motionless before a large German flag. [84-86] The scene cuts to a blue title card reading "MEIN FREUND IST AfD" with a red arrow, followed by the men running through a grassy field wearing black mohawk wigs. [86-92] Holding hands, they walk through the field of yellow flowers; the older man gestures outward with his left arm before lowering it as they proceed. [92-94] The video concludes with a digital map background featuring navigation text: "Abonnieren", "Mehr aus dieser Folge", "Zur ganzen Sendung", and "Weitere Clips".

[80-82] A bald man in a black leather jacket lowers his arms from an outward gesture, bringing his right hand near his midsection with fingers curled while his left arm hangs by his side. Beside him, an older man in a dark suit stands motionless against a waving German flag. [94-104] The video displays a static end screen featuring a dark blue digital globe background composed of glowing data points. Four white text labels remain fixed: "Abonnieren" top left, "Mehr aus dieser Folge" top right, "Zur ganzen Sendung" middle left, and "Weitere Clips" middle right. A red and blue graphical bar stays stationary at the bottom right corner. No movement or new visual elements appear.
